overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The journey traverses covered walkways beneath elevated highways, open commercial plazas with digital billboards, and ends at a busy intersection with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: player character walking steadily through covered walkway with reflective wet pavement

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated glass facade and vertical neon strips
multi-level elevated roadway with metal support beams and neon underlighting
linear fluorescent lights running along the covered walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. The wet pavement reflects the neon ceiling lights and the glass office building rises on the left. The player character walks forward through this sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with vendor kiosks and commercial signage

events.description: passing blue vendor kiosk with purple neon OPEN sign and glass display windows

agents.ego_description: walking past the blue kiosk and continuing through the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing inside the blue kiosk behind the counter

entered.detail: small hexagonal blue structure with purple neon trim and OPEN signage
illuminated corporate signage for Marmur Bank mounted on building facade
tropical trees planted in concrete planters along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a more exposed plaza area featuring a distinctive blue vendor kiosk with neon lighting. The Marmur Bank sign becomes visible in the distance as the player passes palm trees and benches. The elevated highway structure remains visible on the right but closer now.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial corridor with overhead digital displays

events.description: entering covered corridor with large overhead digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath massive digital advertisements

entered.detail: massive suspended digital screens displaying advertisements spanning the corridor width
large digital advertisement for Broseph Brewing Co with health warning text

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered commercial corridor dominated by massive overhead digital billboards displaying vibrant advertisements. The space feels more enclosed with the ceiling structure overhead, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the neon glow from the screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with gang mural and transition to street intersection

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open plaza with large orange Valentinos gang mural
approaching street crosswalk and slowing to observe oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: walking toward the street intersection passing the large V mural and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: massive orange wall with stylized V logo representing the Valentinos gang territory
busy downtown intersection with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered corridor into a wide open plaza dominated by a massive orange Valentinos gang mural. The space opens up to reveal the night sky and a busy street intersection ahead with futuristic vehicles passing by. Trees and additional pedestrians populate this transition zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and futuristic traffic

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as multiple futuristic cars pass through the intersection
traffic light changes to green, allowing pedestrian crossing to begin

agents.ego_description: stopped at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic light to change

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the crosswalk intersection

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
illuminated traffic signal showing red for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the street intersection and stops at the crosswalk to wait for traffic. Futuristic vehicles drive through the yellow-striped crossing while the traffic light remains red. The scene captures the busy downtown atmosphere with illuminated skyscrapers surrounding the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into an open, neon-lit commercial plaza. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, where wet pavement reflects the glow of ceiling lights beside a towering glass office building. As the character walks forward, the sheltered environment gradually opens up into an exposed plaza area. The scene then shifts to reveal a distinctive blue neon vendor kiosk and palm trees, while the Marmur Bank sign emerges in the distance. The camera continues its progression as the elevated highway structure looms closer on the right, framing the transition into the wider city space.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit commercial corridor into a wide-open urban plaza and finally to a bustling city intersection. It begins within a covered walkway where massive overhead digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet pavement. As the player moves forward, the enclosed ceiling gives way to the open night sky, shifting the environment into a spacious plaza dominated by a large orange Valentinos gang mural and scattered greenery. The scene then expands further as the camera approaches a busy street intersection, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at a yellow-striped crosswalk, framed by towering illuminated skyscrapers and the constant flow of traffic.
